title: GEO / AI AAS Agency — Rankett's 5-phase fulfillment SOP
html:
TL;DR

  • A 68-task SOP across 5 phases for delivering ai search optimization (or geo generative engine optimization) — the operational guts beneath rankett's pitch.
  • 92% of tasks are n8n-automatable; 8% manual moat — reddit posting and schema deployment specifically left as human work.
  • Phase 1 (Technical Foundation): robots.txt opens for gptbot / oai searchbot / perplexitybot / claudebot; LLM.txt rules; full schema generation; sitemap registration.
  • Phase 2 (Entity & Authority): LinkedIn / crunchbase / 3-5 industry profiles; 3-5 stats pages with 20-30 sourced stats each; YouTube channel + transcripts.
  • Phase 3-5 (Content / Dashboard / Monitoring): weekly blog automations, Reddit/Quora answer queue, hubspot deal pipeline, ranked com API integration, monthly PDF report auto-emails.

What this doc is

This is the operational manual that would let a single Rankett operator (or VA team) execute fulfillment for 10+ agencies without dropping balls. Yahir's framing at top: "92% n8n automatable, 8% manual moat. Scale: 10 clients solo → 100+ via VA/partners."

The thesis at the bottom of the doc: "one-stop AI presence partner that both diagnoses AND fixes the problem. BEFORE: 'You're invisible to AI' → AFTER: 'You dominate AI recommendations'." This is rankett's explicit category claim.

Phase 1 — Technical foundation

Access: get CMS creds (wordpress / shopify / webflow / squarespace), DNS access, cPanel/SFTP, identify CMS automation path.

Indexing: verify Google Search Console indexing, backup current robots.txt, write new robots.txt allowing gptbot / oai searchbot / perplexitybot / claudebot, create llm txt with allowed sections + crawl rules, validate accessible via browser, run discoverability test in chatgpt + perplexity.

Schema/SEO: generate JSON-LD for Organization / LocalBusiness / Service+Product / FAQPage / Review schemas, insert via CMS, validate via google rich results test, Core Web Vitals via PageSpeed API, fix mobile-friendliness errors, canonical tags on top-10 URLs, confirm sitemap.xml registered, verify GPTBot crawl in server logs.

Recurring: biweekly timestamp refresh on top-5 URLs, monthly schema re-validate, quarterly Web Vitals + crawl error monitoring.

Phase 2 — Entity & authority

Profiles: linkedin company page, NAP sync, crunchbase profile, 3-5 industry profiles (bbb / capterra / g2 / industry-specific), logos + photos to each, canonical descriptions.

Stats pages: 3-5 pages titled "{Industry} Statistics 2025" or "{City} Service Benchmarks," each with 20-30 cited stats + expert commentary, internal-linked from homepage, submitted to Google Indexing API.

YouTube authority: client-branded channel, scripts via LLM, talking-head or screen-share recordings, full transcripts (captions + text), embedded on Stats/FAQ pages.

Recurring: monthly stat-add per page, quarterly profile refresh, quarterly new video.

Phase 3 — Content engine

Setup: internal content calendar (Google Sheet + n8n cron), 10 answer-first CMS templates (FAQ, How-To, Comparison, "Best {Service} in {City}"), H2-as-question + direct-answer-intro convention, CMS API ↔ n8n, LLM API (anthropic claude / groq) ↔ n8n.

External channels: medium, substack, LinkedIn Articles — oAuth-connected.

Community: reddit (3+ aged accounts), quora account, prepared automated workflow that scrapes subs → collects questions → generates answers → queues for QA. Critical: QA gate ensures no banned keywords or promotional phrasing before any auto-publish. Alert on >10 upvotes for re-engagement.

Recurring: weekly blog auto-publish, biweekly stats refresh, monthly 3 external posts, monthly 5 Reddit/Quora seeded answers, monthly E-E-A-T edits on top-5 pages.

Phase 4 — Dashboard & reporting

hubspot deal + "AI Visibility Clients" pipeline, 8 custom properties (Visibility Score, Target, ROI, etc.), master Google Sheet backup, hubspot ↔ n8n ↔ ranked com API.

Reports: Google Docs template, n8n→Docs→PDF→Email node, calendly link in footer, Slack #clients channel for alerts.

Recurring: daily HubSpot score update, weekly drop-alerts (>15% visibility drop), monthly auto-PDF report, quarterly ROI baseline-vs-current report.

Phase 5 — Monitoring & optimization

Weekly: ranked.com baseline refresh, citation parsing from perplexity / chatgpt logs, competitor share-of-voice re-ranking. Monthly: LLM sentiment analysis, "Action Brief" auto-generation, entity-mention checks via Google Search API. Quarterly: update LLM bot list, audit n8n workflow logs.

Why it matters in the graph

This doc closes the gap between Rankett's positioning (sold via 2026 04 27 Rankett.com partner-program copy) and Rankett's production system. The 92/8 automation split is the actual business model — labor costs collapse if n8n can carry the weight, and the human moat is reputationally-sensitive Reddit posting + schema deployments.

Privacy

No credentials in this doc.
